headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $23
summary: UBS  analyst Robin Farley   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $20 to $23.
